mechanism_family_definitions.balance_sheet: uninsured deposits / AFS-HTM losses / capital / derivatives concentration
mechanism_family_definitions.liquidity_funding: repo collateral / rollover / rehypothecation / maturity mismatch / LDI collateral / gilt dysfunction
mechanism_family_definitions.market_wide_stress: FSI composites / VIX / credit spreads / term structure / MOVE / risk-off
mechanism_family_definitions.official_response: facility announcements / event studies / supervisory post-mortems / discount window / external anchors / NBFI

sources.notes: BIS Consolidated Banking Statistics: provider, official URL, documentation, quarterly frequency, 1983Q4 origin, and cross-border claims variables all verified against live BIS pages.
FFIEC CDR public portal serves per-bank quarterly filings since 1976Q1; FDIC documentation page lists schedule variables (RC, RC-B, RC-E uninsured deposits, RC-N, etc.).

sources.downgrade_reason: official_url points to decommissioned SDW domain (sdw.ecb.europa.eu — DNS NXDOMAIN); documentation_url returns HTTP 404. The provider migrated to data.ecb.europa.eu (ECB Data Portal). access_method 'public_sdw_api' is stale; replacement portal exposes a new statistical data warehouse API. P2 must re-pin official_url and documentation_url to data.ecb.europa.eu CBD landing pages before any W1 ingestion.
sources.notes: Provider (ECB) verified live at parent domain. CBD product still exists; URL pinning is broken.

sources.downgrade_reason: documentation_url https://www.ffiec.gov/nicpubweb/nicweb/Y9CMain.aspx returns HTTP 404. The FFIEC NIC product is alive but Y-9C landing has moved (current canonical path is https://www.ffiec.gov/npw/FinancialReport/FinancialDataDownload). Provider, MDRM data dictionary, and quarterly frequency since 1986Q1 verified. PARTIAL not DOWNGRADED because the primary mdrm dictionary is the substantive provenance anchor.
sources.notes: MDRM live; FFIEC NIC nav URL stale. Repair scope: update documentation_url in P2.
FRBNY reference-rates portal: SOFR rate + percentile bands + volume since 2018-04-02 all live and documented.
OFR Short-Term Funding Monitor: dashboard + CSV export live since 2014-01-01; tri-party repo volumes and haircut distributions documented.
H.15 selected interest rates: 1962-01-02 origin, daily business-day release, FRED mirror (DGS10, DFF, DPRIME) — all confirmed.

sources.downgrade_reason: documentation_url for MMSR returns HTTP 404 (page relocated under data.ecb.europa.eu/euro-short-term-rate). Status remains CANDIDATE_REQUIRES_LICENSE_REVIEW so micro-data forbidden_use is appropriate. CW5 relevance partial because UK gilt LDI is primarily a sterling-market event; euro-area MMSR is spillover.
sources.notes: Aggregate ESTR & money-market volumes still public; documentation page needs re-pinning. License boundary (no micro-data redistribution) confirmed in ECB Regulation ECB/2014/48.

FRED API documentation live; series TEDRATE/VIXCLS/BAMLH0A0HYM2/T10Y2Y/STLFSI all individually verifiable; coverage back to 1947 for many macro series; TEDRATE discontinued 2022 (already in known_limitations).

sources.downgrade_reason: documentation_url HEAD timeout/none (alfred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/alfred/ did not return a clean status); landing page is live. ALFRED documentation in practice mirrors the FRED API docs surface with vintage parameters — substantive provenance anchor remains live. PARTIAL not DOWNGRADED because the vintage-data product is well-established and survives provider verification.
sources.notes: Provider live; documentation surface partially unreachable from sandbox HEAD probe; substantive product validated via parent domain and FRED-shared API.
OFR FSI dashboard live, CSV export documented, 2000-01-04 origin confirmed; five regions + five subcomponents match Monin (2017).
STLFSI4 FRED page live; 1993-12-31 origin; weekly frequency; Kliesen-Smith 2010 construction doc live; LIBOR-replacement break already in known_limitations.

sources.downgrade_reason: documentation_url https://www.kansascityfed.org/research/research-publications/measuring-financial-stress/ returns HTTP 404; landing page is live but Hakkio-Keeton 2009 paper moved. KCFSI series itself is alive at FRED. PARTIAL.
sources.notes: Series live on FRED; KC Fed documentation path stale. P2 must re-pin to current KC Fed economic-research permalink.

sources.downgrade_reason: documentation_url cboe.com/tradable_products/vix/vix_historical_data/ returned HTTP 403 (paywall/region or anti-bot). Substantive VIXCLS series mirrored on FRED is verified. PARTIAL.
sources.notes: FRED mirror is the actually-redistributable surface — license boundary already restricts to FRED public daily history. CBOE site documentation may require login; not a primary provenance failure.

sources.downgrade_reason: Both official_url (theice.com/iba/move-index) and documentation_url (theice.com/publicdocs/MOVE_Index_Methodology.pdf) return HTTP 404. Status was already CANDIDATE_REQUIRES_LICENSE_REVIEW and forbidden_use blocks full-history redistribution; downgrading to DOWNGRADED because both URLs are dead. Substantive MOVE series exists but the documentation chain is broken from the registry side.
sources.notes: ICE BofA owns the product; the registry URL pins are stale. P2 must re-pin to current ICE MOVE methodology page or accept DOWNGRADED status permanently.

sources.downgrade_reason: official_url https://www.bis.org/publ/qtrpdf/ returns HTTP 404 (BIS reorganised QR PDF path); BIS QR is still published but at https://www.bis.org/publ/qtrpdf/r_qt<YYYY><Q>.htm or the QR landing https://www.bis.org/publ/qtrpdf/r_qt2304.htm style. Provider verified, documentation parent (/statistics/) live. DOWNGRADED because the registered official_url is dead.
sources.notes: Substantive QR product still alive at BIS; URL pin needs repair in P2 to landing index https://www.bis.org/publ/qtrpdf/ ... check canonical: https://www.bis.org/quarterlyreviews.htm or /publ/quarterly.htm. Verify before re-pinning.
OFR working papers index live; methodology references not raw data is correctly marked as forbidden_use. Glasserman-Young 2015 = OFR WP#29 verifiable.
NBER BCD Committee page live; 1854 origin documented; FRED mirror USREC is canonical ex-post label.

sources.downgrade_reason: Both official_url (foia-financial-crisis-timeline.htm) and documentation_url (monetarypolicy/financial-stability.htm) return HTTP 404 — FRB reorganised its educational tools tree. Provider verified live at parent. Substantive crisis-response chronology is published in FOMC minutes and post-mortem speeches but the registry's pinned URLs are dead. DOWNGRADED.
sources.notes: P2 must re-pin to https://www.federalreserve.gov/publications/financial-stability-report.htm and FRB educational FAQ archive paths.
ECB FSR landing live; semi-annual since 2004; Nov-2022 issue covers UK LDI spillover (CW5 anchor).

sources.downgrade_reason: official_url https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/financial-stability-report/2022 returns HTTP 404 — BoE FSR is now at https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/financial-stability-report path with year-suffix slug variants. documentation_url /working-paper also returns 404 (current path is /working-paper/staff-working-papers). Provider live. DOWNGRADED.
sources.notes: Substantive LDI post-mortem published in BoE FSR Dec 2022 + BoE WP 1019 (Czech-Huang-Silva-Vause 2022); registry URL pinning broken on both fields.

Literature anchors (Eisenberg-Noe 2001, Battiston 2012, Glasserman-Young 2015, Anand 2018, Aldasoro-Alves 2018, Brunnermeier 2009) all preprint-available; license_boundary correctly notes preprint-OK / published-may-be-paywalled.

sources.downgrade_reason: official_url https://www.fdicoig.gov/publications/material-loss-reviews returns HTTP 404; documentation_url FDIC press 2023 index returns HTTP 200. Provider live; substantive product (FDIC OIG MLRs) exists. The MLRs are now at /sites/default/files/publications/ or /reports/material-loss-reviews. PARTIAL (not DOWNGRADED) because docs URL still works and FDIC OIG product is canonical.
sources.notes: P2 must re-pin official_url to current FDIC OIG MLR archive endpoint.
Bundesbank discussion papers index live; SSRN live; Upper-Worms 2004, Mistrulli 2011, Anand-Craig-von-Peter 2015, Battiston 2016 all verifiable.

sources.downgrade_reason: documentation_url https://www.federalreserve.gov/econres/feds.htm returns HTTP 404 (FEDS index reorganised). NBER official_url live. Brunnermeier 2009 + Gorton-Metrick 2012 + Krishnamurthy-Nagel-Orlov 2014 + Copeland-Martin-Walker 2014 all preprint-available. PARTIAL.
sources.notes: Substantive lit anchors all reachable via NBER; FEDS index path is stale. P2 must re-pin to https://www.federalreserve.gov/econres/feds/index.htm.
